report_metadata.critical_finding: Elevator false positive bug is FIXED, but balcony numeric string values still not recognized

issues.description: Elevator items with boolean false value incorrectly extracted as true

improvement.root_cause_fixed: isPositiveValue() now explicitly checks for 'false' string and returns false

issues.description: Balcony items with numeric string values ('3', '13') not extracted
issues.extraction_logic: isPositiveValue() only handles keywords, not numeric strings

issues.description: API returns balcony values as STRING type ('3', '13'), not numeric
issues.root_cause: isPositiveValue() does not parse numeric strings - INCOMPLETE FIX

improvement.numeric_fix_reason: Fix was incomplete - code change exists but doesn't handle STRING numeric values
improvement.actual_issue: API returns '3' and '13' as strings, not numbers, but isPositiveValue() only handles numeric type

finding_1.title: Elevator False Positive Bug: FIXED ✅
finding_1.description: The critical bug where properties without elevators (API false value) were incorrectly marked as having elevators has been fixed.

evidence.fix_reason: isPositiveValue() now returns false for string 'false'

finding_1.impact: HIGH - Improves data quality by eliminating false positives

finding_2.title: Balcony Numeric Values Bug: NOT FIXED ❌
finding_2.description: The bug where balcony items with numeric area values are not extracted has NOT been fixed. In fact, extraction rate REGRESSED from 50% to 0%.

root_cause.issue: API returns balcony values as STRING type ('3', '13'), not numeric type
root_cause.code_problem: isPositiveValue() only handles numeric type (number), not string numeric values
root_cause.expected_fix: Should parse numeric strings with parseFloat() or parseInt()
root_cause.actual_code: Code only checks: if (typeof value === 'number') { return value > 0; }
root_cause.missing_implementation: No handling for String('3') or String('13')

finding_2.impact: CRITICAL - Data quality deteriorated, 50% regression in balcony extraction

finding_3.title: Incomplete Implementation
finding_3.description: The numeric fix was mentioned in the requirements but only partially implemented. It handles numeric types but not numeric string types.
finding_3.requirements: Update isPositiveValue() to recognize numeric values > 0
finding_3.missing: String numeric values like '3', '13' are not parsed
finding_3.fix_needed: Add parseFloat() check before keyword matching

current_logic.step_2: Check if numeric type > 0 → return true ✓
current_logic.step_3: Convert to string and check for negative keywords (ne, no, false) → return false ✓
current_logic.step_4: Check for positive keywords (ano, yes, true, etc.) → return boolean
current_logic.missing: Parse numeric STRING values like '3', '13' BEFORE keyword check

api_value_types_observed.problem: Code assumes all non-numeric values are keywords, but API returns area values as strings

priority_1_critical.action: Update isPositiveValue() to parse numeric strings before keyword matching
priority_1_critical.implementation: Add: const numVal = parseFloat(str); if (!isNaN(numVal) && numVal > 0) return true;
priority_1_critical.testing: Re-test with all 6 listings, verify no regressions

priority_2_high.action: Document the false-positive fix and ensure it's properly tested
priority_2_high.testing: Verify false value handling in CI/CD

priority_3_medium.action: Test with 50+ listings to verify AC, Security, Fireplace extraction
priority_3_medium.impact: Currently 0% availability in sample, but likely present in larger dataset

before_and_after.note: Higher rate and no false positives = improved
API returns string '3', but code only handles numeric type

conclusion.overall_assessment: MIXED RESULTS - One bug fixed, one bug still broken (regression)
conclusion.elevator_false_positive: ✅ FIXED - No more false positives on false values
conclusion.balcony_numeric: ❌ NOT FIXED - Numeric STRING values still not recognized, extraction rate regressed
next_steps: Apply numeric string parsing fix to isPositiveValue()
Re-test to verify extraction rates improve
Ensure no regressions in other fields
conclusion.data_quality_impact: NEGATIVE - Overall enrichment rate decreased due to balcony regression
